title: Snow Golem Woman
description: Replaces the Snow Golem with a female version of it!
body:
This texture pack adds:

- A female version of the Snow Golem
- Replaces the Carved Pumpkin
- Nothing else I think
ya

![waman :3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3753d03fd9e10d9c4dd0ea05ead4098954f1f00c.png)

hope you'll enjoy this texture pack and stuff!!!!

:P
